message:
feat(ft-core): add sparse tensor types (SparseCOOTensor, SparseCSRTensor)

Part of frankentorch-0tw (sparse tensor storage and basic sparse ops).

Adds:
- SparseCOOTensor: COO (Coordinate) format with indices and values
- SparseCSRTensor: CSR (Compressed Sparse Row) format for 2D matrices
- SparseTensorError: error types for sparse tensor operations
- to_dense() conversion for both formats
- 8 unit tests covering creation, conversion, and error cases

Next: add sparse creation functions to ft-api (sparse_coo_tensor, to_sparse, to_dense)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
